nav.arbol_desc: Build and explore your family history
nav.lugar_desc: Parishes, villages, and municipalities of your ancestors

associations.default_description: We are pleased to welcome you to the portal of our institution. This page serves as a meeting and communication space for the community in the diaspora.
associations.default_history: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
associations.default_objectives:
Our main objectives consist of:
1) Preserve, encourage and spread Galician culture, customs and identity in the region.
2) Foster unity, intergenerational exchange and mutual support between descendants and the community.
3) Offer and organize recreational workshops, academic conferences, artistic activities and events of the diaspora.
associations.claim_desc: This page contains the contact information officially registered for the institution. If you are a member of the board of directors of this association, you can register and claim control of this microsite for free to customize the history, upload directors, and publish news.
associations.board_empty: Board of directors in the process of updating.
associations.news_empty: There are no recent updates published by this center.

footer.tagline: Preserve, reconstruct, and transmit the memory of the Galician diaspora.
footer.hecho_con: Made with ❤️ for the Galician diaspora

home.desc: Galicia Migrante is where the Galician diaspora preserves its memory, reconstructs its genealogy, and reconnects with the Galicia of its ancestors.
home.herramientas_disenadas: Tools specially designed to help you reconstruct your family history, rediscover your origins, and keep Galician culture alive.

arbol.title: Your family tree
arbol.desc: Build and visualize your family history with a high-performance custom engine. Fast import from GEDCOM, CSV, or Excel.

territorio.title: Your place in Galicia
territorio.desc: Accurately locate the original village, parish, and municipality of your ancestors using official Galician geolocation databases.

asociaciones.title: Galician associations
asociaciones.desc: Unified directory of Galician centers in Argentina and worldwide. Exclusive spaces to connect and revive local customs.

blog.title: Diaspora Chronicles
blog.desc: Stories of life, culture, art, and community testimonies. The space for Galician expression and identity in the world.

biblioteca.title: Digital library
biblioteca.desc: Exclusive access to historical books, migration diaries, and documents of historical value for portal members.

tramites.title: Procedures & Xunta
tramites.desc: Updated information guide on Spanish nationality (Democratic Memory Law), return programs, and grants from the Xunta de Galicia.

motor.title: A robust and custom-made genealogy engine
motor.desc: We designed and programmed our own graphic and database engine from scratch. No dependency on generic external libraries that break or become outdated.
motor.punto1_desc: All information is stored in robust SQL schemas, allowing fast searches and instant dynamic connections.
motor.punto2_desc: Explore your family tree on an interactive canvas with smooth zoom, side profiles, dragging, and automatic hierarchy adjustment.
motor.punto3_desc: Visually identify in the tree who was born in Galicia, who emigrated, and who is part of the returned diaspora.

geografia.title: Real geographical connection with the land
geografia.desc: Galician emigration is not explained by generic free-text fields. To find your family's real origin, you need to go down to the maximum Galician administrative detail.
geografia.punto1_desc: We work with the official territorial structure of Galicia with its 4 provinces, 313 municipalities, and more than 3,800 historical parishes.
geografia.punto2_desc: By selecting normalized options instead of writing free text, we ensure that records match exactly across different branches of the community.

comunidad.title: Connected in the Diaspora
comunidad.desc: Find out about the activities of the Galician centers and enjoy articles about the history, art, and present of our community.
comunidad.blog_title: The footprint of Galician emigration in South America
comunidad.blog_desc: A historical journey through the first Galician centers founded at the end of the 19th century in Argentina and Uruguay, their mutual role, and the preservation of the Galician language.

cta_final.titulo: Your family history awaits you in Galicia.
cta_final.desc: Join today the first and only portal designed exclusively to reconstruct, safeguard, and transmit the roots and culture of the Galician diaspora.

about.title: Who we are
about.subtitle: Galicia Migrante was born to give the Galician diaspora a digital infrastructure up to its history.
about.mission_desc1: Create a modern digital ecosystem that allows Galician descendants from all over the world to reconnect with their roots, their territory, their history, their community, their culture, and their identity.
about.mission_desc2: Galicia Migrante complements —without replacing— the traditional Galician centers present in Argentina and the world.
about.vision_desc: Become the main digital infrastructure of reference for the preservation and reconstruction of the historical, cultural, and genealogical memory of the Galician diaspora.
about.principle1_desc: Each section is independent — it can be added, modified, or deactivated without affecting the rest.
about.principle2_desc: The third and fourth generations live on mobile. The experience prioritizes mobile devices.
about.principle3_desc: Argentine Spanish, Galician, and English from the start. Adding a language does not require touching code.
about.principle4_desc: Galician territoriality — parish, village, municipality — is essential to understanding genealogy and migration.
about.principle5_desc: The portal exists to empower traditional Galician centers, not to compete with them.
about.principle6_desc: Genealogy requires verifiable evidence, traceable sources, and change history.
about.differential_desc: the contextual reconstruction of the Galician migration experience, with the level of territorial detail (parish, village) that no other platform offers.
